{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Nine-Hands
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Nine-Hands]] is a warband of the [[Eight]]-Man [[Empire]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10">''Uncrowned'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
